artifacts.fraction|codex:
```python
def fraction_to_decimal(num, den):
    if num == 0:
        return '0'

    sign = '-' if (num < 0) ^ (den < 0) else ''
    num, den = abs(num), abs(den)

    res = sign + str(num // den)
    rem = num % den

    if rem == 0:
        return res

    res += '.'
    seen = {}
    f = ''

    while rem:
        if rem in seen:
            i = seen[rem]
            return res + f[:i] + '(' + f[i:] + ')'
        seen[rem] = len(f)
        rem *= 10
        f += str(rem // den)
        rem %= den

    return res + f
```

```python
def fraction_to_decimal(num, den):
    if num == 0: return '0'
    res = ''
    if (num < 0) != (den < 0): res += '-'
    num, den = abs(num), abs(den)
    res += str(num//den); rem = num % den
    if rem == 0: return res
    res += '.'; seen = {}; f = ''
    while rem:
        if rem in seen: i = seen[rem]; return res + f[:i] + '(' + f[i:] + ')'
        seen[rem] = len(f); rem *= 10; f += str(rem//den); rem %= den
    return res + f
```

def fraction_to_decimal(num, den):
    if num == 0: return '0'
    sign = '-' if (num < 0) ^ (den < 0) else ''
    num, den = abs(num), abs(den)
    res = sign + str(num // den); rem = num % den
    if rem == 0: return res
    res += '.'; seen = {}; f = ''
    while rem:
        if rem in seen: i = seen[rem]; return res + f[:i] + '(' + f[i:] + ')'
        seen[rem] = len(f); rem *= 10; f += str(rem // den); rem %= den
    return res + f
